ogTitle: Leneva vs Leonards Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Leneva and Leonards Hill.
heading: Leneva vs Leonards Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Leneva, Victoria and Leonards Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Leonards Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Leneva (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Leneva or Leonards Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Leneva has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Leonards Hill scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Leneva scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Leonards Hill scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Leneva or Leonards Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Leonards Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
